title: Mellow Ukrainian Walnut Crumble
description: A delicious dessert that combines the richness of walnuts with the warmth of mellow spices and the crunch of a crumble topping.
instructions: Mix together the sugar, flour, and mellow in a bowl.
Add the chopped walnuts and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
Mix together the crumble topping ingredients.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the top of the walnut mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
Serve warm, topped with whipped cream or vanilla ice cream if desired.
